name: Everyone Loves Me
overview: On the day Yue Qianling resigned, she coincidentally crossed paths with her secret crush, Gu Xun, who had just joined as the head of the 9th Business Unit. She didn't hesitate to return to the company to boldly pursue Gu Xun, but he remained indifferent. He even harshly rejected her confession in front of the entire school. Little did she know, Gu Xun had long fallen for his fearless online friend "Sticky Dough Twist". Who would have expected that his online friend turned out to be Yue Qianling herself? Upon discovering the truth, Gu Xun had no choice but to embark on a humorous and heartwarming "reverse pursuit" journey.

trailers.title: ENGSUB【TRAILER】💥定档预告来袭！月老掉线，“千顾佳话”攻势逆转！小白花变拽姐，冷面校草下跪追爱！😮 | 别对我动心 Everyone Loves Me | 林一/周也 |优酷 YOUKU
ENGSUB【TRAILER】❣️林一周也心动来袭！从阴差阳错的告白到甜度爆表的恋爱💗，看校花校草超甜奔赴！ | 别对我动心 Everyone Loves Me | 林一/周也 | 优酷 YOUKU
